---
name: Feature Request / New Exercise
about: Suggest an idea for a new section, topic, or exercise
title: '[PROPOSAL] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Describe the proposed feature or content**
What new Go concept do you want covered? What would the exercise look like?

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative topic placements or approaches.

**Who is this for?**
Which level of developer (Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) would benefit from this?

**Additional context**
Add any other context or requirements about the feature request here.
